# Policy schema

Policy objects are authored as YAML and validated against a JSON Schema
Draft 2020-12 document generated from `pkg/apitypes`. The schema is
bundled in the binary — `sluice schema export` emits a oneOf union
of all registered Kinds; `--kind` narrows to one Kind.

## Shared envelope

Every Kind shares the Kubernetes-style envelope:

```yaml
apiVersion: sluice.bino.bi/v1alpha1
kind: <Kind>
metadata:
  name: <unique within Kind>
  namespace: <optional>
  labels: { ... }
  annotations: { ... }
  priority: <int32, higher wins conflict ties>
spec: { ... }
```

Fields under `spec` are Kind-specific; the tables below list them.

## Kinds

| Kind | Summary |
| ---- | ------- |
| `DataSource` | Attach a catalog to DuckDB. |
| `SubjectBinding` | Map issuer + claim paths onto canonical subject fields. |
| `SqlAccessPolicy` | Allow or deny a subject's access to resources. |
| `RowFilterPolicy` | Inject a WHERE predicate on matching rows. |
| `ColumnMaskPolicy` | Replace column values through a mask provider. |
| `QueryRejectPolicy` | Reject queries matching a static rule or CEL expression. |
| `QueryRewritePolicy` | Apply a LIMIT, sample, or timeout transformation. |
| `ApprovalPolicy` | Require human approval (via webhook) before a matching query runs. |
| `RelationshipPolicy` | Gate access via a ReBAC backend (OpenFGA) relationship check. |
| `DataClassification` | Assign tags to resources so policies can match on tags instead of names. |
| `AuditSink` | Forward audit records to file / S3 / Postgres / syslog. |

### DataSource

Attach a catalog to DuckDB.

| Field | Type | Notes |
| ----- | ---- | ----- |
| `type` | `DataSourceType` | required |
| `connection` | `string` | optional |
| `credentialsRef` | `string` | optional |
| `path` | `string` | optional |
| `bucket` | `string` | optional |
| `prefix` | `string` | optional |
| `region` | `string` | optional |
| `allowedPaths` | `[]string` | optional, list |
| `endpoint` | `string` | optional |
| `database` | `string` | optional |
| `tokenRef` | `string` | optional |
| `readonly` | `bool` | required |
| `schemas` | `[]string` | optional, list |
| `tables` | `[]string` | optional, list |
| `attachMode` | `AttachMode` | optional |
| `healthCheck` | `HealthSpec?` | optional |
| `healthCheck.query` | `string` | required |
| `healthCheck.interval` | `Duration` | required |

### SubjectBinding

Map issuer + claim paths onto canonical subject fields.

| Field | Type | Notes |
| ----- | ---- | ----- |
| `issuer` | `string` | optional |
| `audience` | `string` | optional |
| `jwksUrl` | `string` | optional |
| `hmacSecretRef` | `string` | optional |
| `jwksCacheTtl` | `Duration` | optional |
| `clockSkew` | `Duration` | optional |
| `claims` | `ClaimPaths` | optional |
| `claims.subjectId` | `string` | optional |
| `claims.email` | `string` | optional |
| `claims.groups` | `string` | optional |
| `claims.tenantId` | `string` | optional |
| `claims.allowedRegions` | `string` | optional |
| `groupsSource` | `string` | optional |
| `rateLimit` | `RateLimitSpec?` | optional |
| `rateLimit.rps` | `float64` | required |
| `rateLimit.burst` | `int` | required |
| `budget` | `BudgetSpec?` | optional |
| `budget.cpuSecondsPerDay` | `int64` | optional |
| `budget.rowsPerDay` | `int64` | optional |
| `apiKeys` | `[]APIKeyBinding` | optional, list |

### SqlAccessPolicy

Allow or deny a subject's access to resources.

| Field | Type | Notes |
| ----- | ---- | ----- |
| `enforcementMode` | `EnforcementMode` | optional |
| `effect` | `Effect` | required |
| `match` | `Selector` | required |
| `match.any` | `[]Clause` | optional, list |
| `match.all` | `[]Clause` | optional, list |
| `exclude` | `Selector?` | optional |
| `exclude.any` | `[]Clause` | optional, list |
| `exclude.all` | `[]Clause` | optional, list |
| `conditions` | `[]Condition` | optional, list |
| `message` | `string` | optional |
| `errorCode` | `string` | optional |

### AuditSink

Forward audit records to file / S3 / Postgres / syslog.

| Field | Type | Notes |
| ----- | ---- | ----- |
| `type` | `AuditSinkType` | required |
| `path` | `string` | optional |
| `rotateDaily` | `bool` | optional |
| `rotateSizeMB` | `int` | optional |
| `bucket` | `string` | optional |
| `prefix` | `string` | optional |
| `region` | `string` | optional |
| `objectLock` | `S3LockMode` | optional |
| `retentionDays` | `int` | optional |
| `credentialsRef` | `string` | optional |
| `connection` | `string` | optional |
| `table` | `string` | optional |
| `network` | `string` | optional |
| `address` | `string` | optional |
| `facility` | `string` | optional |
| `endpoint` | `string` | optional |


## Regenerating

```bash
make docs-generate
```

Walks `pkg/apitypes` via reflection so this page tracks every new
field the moment it lands. The drift gate in `docs-deploy.yaml` fails
when the committed file differs from the generator's output.
